summary.shape_sentence: Early opening pop failed fast, turned into a trend-down session with a midday bounce, afternoon retest of lows, and a weak close above support.

goat.note: Standout countertrend bounce from the midday base into the early-PM rebound.

red_circles.behavior: Appeared at failed reclaims and lower highs; they aligned with continuation-fade behavior after the opening reversal and again on the afternoon rollover.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly acted as support-confirmation markers; the key RTH one appeared late as the 24,920-24,935 demand area held.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Opening supply around 25,160-25,250 was respected and drove the day lower; later supply near 24,995-25,010 capped rebound attempts.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Early demand near 25,070-25,090 broke, while lower demand around 24,895-24,930 was tested multiple times and held into the close.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening spike had failed and price was already shifting into a downside trend under supply.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was basing after the flush, rotating below the bearish cloud near the 24,900-24,980 zone.
time_markers.2pm_green: The lunch bounce had already rolled over and price was resuming weakness toward the afternoon retest.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Cash close came after a defense of lower demand, but the session still finished weak and near the low end of the day.

takeaway: Bearish opening-reversal trend day with a lunch bounce that failed beneath supply, followed by a late demand defense that did not fully repair the session.
